code: import React,{useState,useEffect}from"react";import{useLocation,useNavigate}from"react-router-dom";import"./Navbar.css";import logo from"../../assets/logo-fot.png";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Navbar=()=>{const[isMenuOpen,setIsMenuOpen]=useState(false);const[isScrolled,setIsScrolled]=useState(false);const location=useLocation();const navigate=useNavigate();useEffect(()=>{const handleScroll=()=>{setIsScrolled(window.scrollY>50);};window.addEventListener("scroll",handleScroll);return()=>window.removeEventListener("scroll",handleScroll);},[]);const handleNavClick=(e,targetId)=>{if(location.pathname!=="/"){e.preventDefault();navigate("/",{state:{scrollTo:targetId}});}setIsMenuOpen(false);};const handleLogoClick=()=>{if(location.pathname!=="/"){navigate("/");}setIsMenuOpen(false);};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("nav",{className:"navbar ".concat(isScrolled?"scrolled":""),children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"navbar-container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"logo-container",onClick:handleLogoClick,children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:logo,alt:"Logo",className:"logo"})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("button",{className:"burger-menu ".concat(isMenuOpen?"open":""),onClick:()=>setIsMenuOpen(!isMenuOpen),"aria-label":"Toggle menu",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"burger-line"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"burger-line"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"burger-line"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"nav-menu ".concat(isMenuOpen?"active":""),children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("a",{href:"#home",onClick:e=>handleNavClick(e,"home"),children:"Home"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("a",{href:"#about",onClick:e=>handleNavClick(e,"about"),children:"About"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("a",{href:"#services",onClick:e=>handleNavClick(e,"services"),children:"Services"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("a",{href:"#contact",onClick:e=>handleNavClick(e,"contact"),children:"Contact"})]})]})});};export default Navbar;
